TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: United arab emirates u United arab emirates sa i labu nu Ya-cuo, itiza i 24 00 N, 54 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 83,600 sq km. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 83,600 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 0 sq km.hamin nu tademaw sa 5,927,482. kakalukan umah sa 4.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 0.038, zumaay henay umah sa 91.60%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Abu Dhabi . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 2 bulad 12 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, micakat a demiad sa i 2004 a mihca 11 bulad 3 demiad. laylay enemay a se-ci, u Puose-sasan-wan-ciaw kumi metmetay, pitu a se-ci, Ala-puo ti-kuo midebung tina niyadu'an, pasayda i Iselanciw . walu a se-ci sa, Oman malinges mibabelih tu ci Ha-Li yan patideng tu cencun a kawawan, patideng tu sapisiteked nu kawaw, aydaay a A-lan a niyadu' mala nuheni a niyadu'. sabaw tu enem (16) a seci, Putaw-ya (Portugal midebung tina kitidaan, sa bahbahen nu A-man (Oman . sabaw tu walu (18) a se-ci, A-man (Oman sawni micinlaw tulabu, A-lan nu niyadu'ay a sakakaay ci Aymi-el (Emir , mala misiteketay a mikawaway a cen-cun . tawya, nu Ala-puo (Arab a tademaw nu sapisiwbay a balungan, atu O-cuo (Europe nu sapisiwbay a balungaan, sawni a pecien nu adidi'ay a niyadu'ay a kanatal, sisa pangangan han kiya niyadu' " dadipasan a kukun han". cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (1819) a mihcaan, Ing-kuo Tun-ingtu (British East India Company a kusi pataydan nuheni kubalunga nu hitay misikedaay tu Hae-macia , Sya-elcia , Tu-pay (Dubayy a kitidaan nu dadipasan a kitidaan nu hitay, midiput tu In-tu (India katukuh tu Ay-ci (Egypt a caculilan nu balunga. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tusa a bataan (1820) a mihcaan , adidi'ay a kanatal pacicien atu Ing-kuo masasulit tu kiyaku " Puo-sewan pulung nu lihaday a sasulitan ", mihang pasaluemeng tu kukung a kawaw sa. nika nipialawan a wayway katukuh tu cacay a malebat walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima (1835) a mihcaan kya haymaw sa musaluimeng ku kawaw. cacay a malebtu walu a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tulu (1853) a mihcaan, nu adidi'ay a kanatalan masasulit kunuheni tu kiyaku, mihapusa acaay tu kalepacaw sa, sisa, ninaniyadu' han pangangan hantu "Telu-siel-aman " atu nipatidengan tu Mase-kete' (Muscat a A-man (Oman caay kasasuhica. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1892) a mihcaan, Telu-siel-a-man nu pina a kanatal atu Ing-kuo ) masasuli tu kiyaku, miala tuni pidiput nu Ing-kuo , caaykawnu Ing-kuo nu dumaan a kanatal nupisitekeday a nikasasu cabayan, nu Ing-kuo (United Kingdom itidaay i Puose-wan pulung nu dayhiw amimedmed. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa (1952) a mihcaan , Ing-kuo miawda tu pituay a niyaduay a tumuk nu kanatal a Aymi-el Emir mikaygi, ninanipi kaygian taneng mala Ing-kuo cence nu dayhiw a tatatengilan nu kitidaan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku walu (1958) a mihcaan, Apu-capi (Abu Dhabi niyaduan madih tu simal, cacay a malebtu siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tusa (1962) a mihcaan, malinga tu mikutkut tu simal, simal hantu malasakaudip nu angangan nu niyaduay nuheni. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan cacay a bulad, Ing-kuo mihapu papiliyas tu hitay, tusa a bulad, Pa-lin (Bahrain , Ka-ta (Qatar , Apu-tapi (Abu Dhabi , Sa-cia (Sharjah , Tu-pay (Dubayy , Hae-macia , Ase-man , Fuca-ela , Umu-kaywan siwa a kanatal nu Aymi-el itida i Tu-pay (Dubayy mapulung mikagi, mihang patideng tu Alapuo-linhe takun-kuo (United arab emirates , Pa-lin (Bahrain atu Ka-ta (Qatar makakilul miales. Hae-macia caay pikeda tinakawawan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku cacay (1971) a mihcaan pitu a bulad, itida i Dubayy pikagian henay sa, nu enemay a kanatalan milinzi misulit tu sinfa, pabalucu patideng tu A-lan (United Arab Emirates , u A-puta (Abu Dhabi ku linzi mala sudu. sabaw tu tusa a bulad tusa a demiad,A-lan (United Arab Emirates mihapu patideng. sakatusa a mihcaan tu tusaay a bulad, Hae-macia micumud tu A-lan (United Arab Emirates . cacay a malebtu siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku enem (1996) a mihcaan , milinziay a sinfa mahangtu tu tahdauc kuyu sinfa, A-puca-pi (Abu Dhabi mala tatengaay nu sudu. sakaudip bunaw naw A-lan (United Arab Emirates a anganganan nu kakawawen, katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) nu mihcaan. namaka cacay a malabut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku enem (1966) a mihcaan itida i A-lan makaadih tu simal, naw likenlikenan a lala' alaw mala silaculay nu simalsimalan a umah, sisa ina kanatal sumad satu mabuwah ku sakaudipan nuheni. ,10ŚĻīGDP . nika kapah a limulak nu Tu-pay caay kawnu simal. Tu-pay palutadengan kunuheni tu " anusakatusa amapatay nu ngalay sa", sisa matabal malingatu tu milihida tu kakawaw, cacaya a mihcaan nu GDP han celakan tu tusa a lasubu tulu a bataan (230%) a kilac, simal nuni kasilaculan enem (6%) a kilacan, nika i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan mamin tu amalawpes. nikacelakan ni patideng han u hamin nu yadahay a kakawawan. nu pitu a bataan (70) a mihcaan nu caculilan i sawac,walu a bataan (80) a mihcaan misatabaki tu sasiwbayan, siwa a bataan (90) a mihcaan micuduh tu sakatayda tu aaidangan, katukuh tu tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay (21) a seci, itini hantu u Cuo-tun a kitidaan nu sasaluimengan nu sasasiwbayan a kitidaan. tataydan midang nu cacakayan, aadihan tu tilibi. aidangan nu sakaudip mala Tu-pay (Dubayy nu anganganan a sakaudip nu kasilaculan. lalangawan lalangawan atu dadiw A-lan (United Arab Emirates u Ise-lan (Islamic lalangawan ku sakakaay, atu nuduma a Ala-puo (Arab nu kanatal masasungay kunuheni. cenhu hantu midiput tu laylay nu namaka babalakiay a nalimaan atu lalangawan, atu A-puta-pi (Abu Dhabi lalangawan cicinhun a makakadum. amica kuni ka Ise-lancia (Islamic a kanatal, nika u siakay a sakaudip atu kanatal malalitin. A-lan (United Arab Emirates a kanatal masasusikad atu dadiputen tu tataynaan, malecad atu kanatal nu lalangawan masasupaini.

is…ô-r~…ĺan ¶ia (isr~…ĺami ¶ a kanatar~…ĺ, nika u siakaj a sakaudip atu kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin. a-r~…ĺan (unit…ôd arab …ômirat…ôs a kanatar~…ĺ masasusikad atu dadiput…ôn tu tatajnaan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu kanatar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan masasupaini.
S.FORM: United arab emirates u United arab emirates sa i labu nu Ya-cuo, itiza i 24 00 N, 54 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 83,600 sq km. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 83,600 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 0 sq km.hamin nu tademaw sa 5,927,482. kakalukan umah sa 4.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 0.038, zumaay henay umah sa 91.60%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Abu Dhabi . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 2 bulad 12 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, micakat a demiad sa i 2004 a mihca 11 bulad 3 demiad. laylay enemay a se-ci, u Puose-sasan-wan-ciaw kumi metmetay, pitu a se-ci, Ala-puo ti-kuo midebung tina niyadu'an, pasayda i Iselanciw . walu a se-ci sa, Oman malinges kitidaan, sa bahbahen nu A-man (Oman . sabaw tu walu (18) a se-ci, A-man (Oman sawni micinlaw tulabu, A-lan nu niyadu'ay a sakakaay ci Aymi-el (Emir , mala misiteketay a mikawaway a cen-cun . tawya, nu Ala-puo (Arab a tademaw nu sapisiwbay a balungan, atu O-cuo (Europe nu sapisiwbay a balungaan, sawni a pecien nu adidi'ay a niyadu'ay a kanatal, sisa pangangan han kiya niyadu' " dadipasan a kukun han". cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (1819) a mihcaan, Ing-kuo Tun-ingtu (British East India Company a kusi pataydan nuheni kubalunga nu hitay misikedaay tu Hae-macia , Sya-elcia , Tu-pay (Dubayy a kitidaan nu dadipasan a kitidaan nu hitay, midiput tu In-tu (India katukuh tu Ay-ci (Egypt a caculilan nu balunga. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tusa a bataan (1820) a mihcaan , adidi'ay a kanatal pacicien atu Ing-kuo masasulit tu kiyaku " Puo-sewan pulung nu lihaday a sasulitan ", mihang pasaluemeng tu kukung a kawaw sa. nika nipialawan a wayway katukuh tu cacay a malebat walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima (1835) a mihcaan kya haymaw sa musaluimeng ku kawaw. cacay a malebtu walu a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tulu (1853) a mihcaan, nu adidi'ay a kanatalan masasulit kunuheni tu kiyaku, mihapusa acaay tu kalepacaw sa, sisa, ninaniyadu' han pangangan hantu "Telu-siel-aman " atu nipatidengan tu Mase-kete' (Muscat a A-man (Oman caay kasasuhica. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1892) a mihcaan, Telu-siel-a-man nu pina a kanatal atu Ing-kuo ) masasuli tu kiyaku, miala tuni pidiput nu Ing-kuo , caaykawnu Ing-kuo nu dumaan a kanatal nupisitekeday a nikasasu cabayan, nu Ing-kuo (United Kingdom itidaay i Puose-wan pulung nu dayhiw amimedmed. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa (1952) a mihcaan , Ing-kuo miawda tu pituay a niyaduay a tumuk nu kanatal a Aymi-el Emir mikaygi, ninanipi kaygian taneng mala Ing-kuo cence nu dayhiw a tatatengilan nu kitidaan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku walu (1958) a mihcaan, Apu-capi (Abu Dhabi niyaduan madih tu simal, cacay a malebtu siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tusa (1962) a mihcaan, malinga tu mikutkut tu simal, simal hantu malasakaudip nu angangan nu niyaduay nuheni. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan cacay a bulad, Ing-kuo mihapu papiliyas tu hitay, tusa a bulad, Pa-lin (Bahrain , Ka-ta (Qatar , Apu-tapi (Abu Dhabi , Sa-cia (Sharjah , Tu-pay (Dubayy , Hae-macia , Ase-man , Fuca-ela , Umu-kaywan siwa a kanatal nu Aymi-el itida i Tu-pay (Dubayy mapulung mikagi, mihang patideng tu Alapuo-linhe takun-kuo (United arab emirates , Pa-lin (Bahrain atu Ka-ta (Qatar makakilul miales. Hae-macia caay pikeda tinakawawan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku cacay (1971) a mihcaan pitu a bulad, itida i Dubayy pikagian henay sa, nu enemay a kanatalan milinzi misulit tu sinfa, pabalucu patideng tu A-lan (United Arab Emirates , u A-puta (Abu Dhabi ku linzi mala sudu. sabaw tu tusa a bulad tusa a demiad,A-lan (United Arab Emirates mihapu patideng. sakatusa a mihcaan tu tusaay a bulad, Hae-macia micumud tu A-lan (United Arab Emirates . cacay a malebtu siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku enem (1996) a mihcaan , milinziay a sinfa mahangtu tu tahdauc kuyu sinfa, A-puca-pi (Abu Dhabi mala tatengaay nu sudu. sakaudip bunaw naw A-lan (United Arab Emirates a anganganan nu kakawawen, katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) nu mihcaan. namaka cacay a malabut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku enem (1966) a mihcaan itida i A-lan makaadih tu simal, naw likenlikenan a lala' alaw mala silaculay nu simalsimalan a umah, sisa ina kanatal sumad satu mabuwah ku sakaudipan nuheni. ,10ŚĻīGDP . nika kapah a limulak nu Tu-pay caay kawnu simal. Tu-pay palutadengan kunuheni tu " anusakatusa amapatay nu ngalay sa", sisa matabal malingatu tu milihida tu kakawaw, cacaya a mihcaan nu GDP han celakan tu tusa a lasubu tulu a bataan (230%) a kilac, simal nuni kasilaculan enem (6%) a kilacan, nika i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan mamin tu amalawpes. nikacelakan ni patideng han u hamin nu yadahay a kakawawan. nu pitu a bataan (70) a mihcaan nu caculilan i sawac,walu a bataan (80) a mihcaan misatabaki tu sasiwbayan, siwa a bataan (90) a mihcaan micuduh tu sakatayda tu aaidangan, katukuh tu tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay (21) a seci, itini hantu u Cuo-tun a kitidaan nu sasaluimengan nu sasasiwbayan a kitidaan. tataydan midang nu cacakayan, aadihan tu tilibi. aidangan nu sakaudip mala Tu-pay (Dubayy nu anganganan a sakaudip nu kasilaculan. lalangawan lalangawan atu dadiw A-lan (United Arab Emirates u Ise-lan (Islamic lalangawan ku sakakaay, atu nuduma a Ala-puo (Arab nu kanatal masasungay kunuheni. cenhu hantu midiput tu laylay nu namaka babalakiay a nalimaan atu lalangawan, atu A-puta-pi (Abu Dhabi lalangawan cicinhun a makakadum. amica kuni ka Ise-lancia (Islamic a kanatal, nika u siakay a sakaudip atu kanatal malalitin. A-lan (United Arab Emirates a kanatal masasusikad atu dadiputen tu tataynaan, malecad atu kanatal nu lalangawan masasupaini.
